data.title: Report Data

errors.promptSetRequired: A prompt set (market) is required to generate a report
errors.brandRequired: At least one brand must be specified (provide brandId or brandIds)
errors.brandIdConflict: Provide either brandId or brandIds, not both
errors.tooManyBrands: A maximum of {max} brands can be included in a single report

formatDescriptions.pdf: Branded report with charts and analysis

job.tooManyConcurrent: Too many reports generating. Please wait for current reports to finish.

empty.title: No reports yet

downloads.expiresIn: {days, plural, one {# day left} other {# days left}}

schedules.title: Scheduled Reports
schedules.description: Set up recurring reports delivered automatically by email
schedules.name: Schedule Name

errors.invalidFrequency: Invalid frequency. Must be daily, weekly, or monthly
errors.noRecipients: At least one recipient is required
errors.tooManyRecipients: A maximum of 25 recipients per schedule
errors.tooManySchedules: Maximum of 25 schedules per workspace reached

empty.title: No scheduled reports
empty.description: Set up recurring reports to keep stakeholders updated automatically.

schedules.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete "{name}" and cancel all future deliveries.

form.name: Name
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Brief description of this scheduled report
form.scheduleHelp: Uses cron syntax (e.g., '0 9 * * MON' for every Monday at 9am)
form.sendIfEmptyHelp: Send report even when no data matches the selected scope
form.formatInfo: Scheduled reports are delivered as PDF

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 255 characters or fewer
validation.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 1000 characters or fewer
validation.brandsRequired: At least one brand is required
validation.brandsTooMany: A maximum of 25 brands can be selected
validation.recipientsRequired: At least one recipient is required
validation.disposableEmailNotAllowed: This email provider isn't allowed. Please use a permanent address.
validation.dateRangeInvalid: End date must be after start date
